arts.ttl: 'I can guarantee': Chelsea are absolutely in love with 'complete' player who hasn’t played this season - Romano
Ben Foster says how much it would cost clubs to sign Cole Palmer from Chelsea
arts.sum: Chelsea’s Cole Palmer continues to make a mockery of his transfer cost every week with a constant string of outrageously good performances. The Chelsea squad...

arts.ttl: How to buy Cole Palmer record-breaking Chelsea shirt amid Cristiano Ronaldo prediction
arts.sum: Chelsea supporters have been offered the opportunity to purchase Cole Palmer's record-breaking match-worn home shirt from Saturday afternoon's 4-2 win over Brighton, but would-be bidders need to have deep pockets! The shirt is now seen as highly lucrative among collectors after Palmer became the first player in Premier League history to score four goals in the first half of a match.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca masterminded Chelsea defeat, he proved his tactical genius five years ago
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has impressed greatly since becoming Chelsea manager over the summer in just his first season as a Premier League manager. The Blues currently...

arts.ttl: Chelsea want to sign Arsenal's Calafiori backup
arts.sum: Chelsea have been scouting Bayer Leverkusen defender Piero Hincapie, according to a report. A versatile defender who can play at centre-back and left-back, Hincapie had no shortage of suitors in the summer, but the Bundesliga champions were desperate to keep hold of him.

arts.ttl: Mauricio Pochettino leaves out Chelsea duo from USMNT squad after landing new 'special' job
arts.sum: Mauricio Pochettino has omitted Caleb Wiley and Gabriel Slonina from the United States Men's National Team ahead of the October international break. So, with that being said, football.london have taken a look at Pochettino's first USMNT squad.

However, his exclusion from Enzo Maresca's league phase squad means he'll have his feet up when Gent come to town in midweek. Chelsea will have to dazzle in the absence of Cole Palmer when they take on Gent in the Conference League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Cesare Casadei reveals stance taken during summer talks
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei reveals that it was his decision - not Enzo Maresca's - to remain at Stamford Bridge for the first half of the season.

arts.ttl: 'Stay': ESPN pundit has urged former Chelsea player to reject Liverpool if they come knocking
arts.sum: 'I like the fact that he has found a place where he’s thriving.'
